fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Maine Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Maine — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license maine, dental assistant certification maine, RDA maine, DANB CDA maine, dental assistant radiography maine

quick_facts.exam_name: DANB CDA exam (for Registered Dental Assistant)
quick_facts.ce_requirement: 12 hours per renewal cycle (for Registered Dental Assistant)

license_types.title: Expanded Function Dental Assistant (EFDA)
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Maine.

steps.title: Complete a Dental Assisting Program
steps.description: Graduate from a CODA-accredited dental assisting program to qualify for the DANB CDA exam.

steps.title: Pass the DANB CDA Exam
steps.description: Successfully complete the Dental Assisting National Board (DANB) Certified Dental Assistant (CDA) exam.

steps.title: Apply for Registration
steps.description: Submit an application to the Maine Board of Dental Practice along with required documentation and fees.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Expanded Function Dental Assistant (EFDA) through the Maine Board of Dental Practice by license.

faqs.question: Does Maine require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maine requires Expanded Function Dental Assistant (EFDA) through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Maine?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Maine.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Maine?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Maine?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $271. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Maine does not license general dental assistants. EFDA license required for expanded functions.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Maine
hero.dek: Maine Dental Assistant registration requires graduation from an accredited program, passing the DANB CDA exam, and CPR certification.
